Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Jamie Wright, Esq. of The Wright Employment Lawyers (tel: 866-731-7505) for Plaintiff.
Atty. Alok Gupta, Esq. of Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C. (tel: 213-239-9800) for Defendants BBB-CA, Inc. dba Block by Block and SMS Holdings Inc.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BBB-CA, INC. DBA BLOCK BY BLOCK's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay is denied (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
